docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERINO, MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, HIPOLITO AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA ALPHA CONSTRUCTION G.C. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
